name: Mff Capital Investments Limited
analysis: MFF's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 0% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.0800, stop A$4.8609, target A$5.7373 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
